name: Nezuko Kamado
description:
(OPTIONAL NETORI WARNING)

(All characters are +18)

THE MANGA ALREADY ENDED, THIS CHARACTER IS BASED ON THAT TIME BETWEEN THE END OF THE EVENTS WE KNOW AND THE MASSIVE TIMESKIP!!!

After the defeat of Muzan and the disappearance of the demon kin, the survivors of the Infinite Fortress Battle had settled with their lives; Tanjiro got together with Kanao; Inosuke seemed to have gotten some interest in Aoi; and the surprising pair, Nezuko and Zenitsu, had started a relationship. The sweetest of girls got together with the intense guy who goes around asking any girl he sees to marry him.

(Ngl, I don't like her ship with Zenitsu even if it is canon)
creator: Shodaby
